title: Lesson: Open Shove cEV 10BB + Bounty Ranges
plan: Read the 3 reference PDFs to extract open shove ranges by position/stack and bounty-adjusted ranges
Define position-based range data sets (_OPEN_SHOVE_RANGES, _BOUNTY_RANGES) in lesson_classifier.py
Add helper methods _open_shove_hand_tier() and _bounty_hand_tier() for hand classification
Enhance lesson 4 detection (line ~495) with proper range evaluation based on position and stack depth
Add _eval_bounty_intro() and _eval_bounty_ranges() evaluation methods for lessons 24-25 with bounty-adjusted range validation
Update lessons 24-25 detection (lines ~634-644) to include executed_correctly evaluation
Add 50-70+ tests in test_lesson_classifier.py covering all three lessons: tier membership, correct/incorrect/marginal classifications, detection conditions, edge cases
Run quality gates (typecheck, lint, tests, build)
Update prd.json status and active.md tracking
